text_block_list.text: I believed that coming to Tracen Academy would change my worldвАХвАХ

After a fateful encounter with an exceptional Uma 
Musume, enjoying those halycon days. However, even 
after coming here, the days remained colorless.

I still wasn't reponsible for anyone, but I 
wasn't sure what to look for when scouting. I 
sighed, wondering if the dull days would continue.

It was during that time that I happened to see 
a certain Umamusume on the training course. She 
hadn't debuted yet, but something caught my eye.
HaaвА¶вА¶ HaaвА¶вА¶ AhaaвШЖ AhahaaвШЕ

text_block_list.text: Ahahahahaa, MarпљЮvelпљЮпљЮousвШЖвШЕвШЖ

text_block_list.text:
Cheerfully laughing while running, I was 
captivated. She seemed to be delighted, 
having fun while she was running. That UmamusumeвАХвАХ

Suddenly, in the middle of the course 
she collapsed and layed sprawled out!
ZehвА¶вА¶Aha вА¶вА¶Hahaa вА¶вА¶zeh, HaaвА¶вА¶ Ahahaha, haa.

text_block_list.text:
HaaвА¶вА¶ AhahaвА¶вА¶ YeahвШЖ 
I'm just MarvelousвШЕ AhahaaвШЖ
text_block_list.name: пЉЯпЉЯпЉЯ

text_block_list.text:
I was worried she had overexerted herself, but this Umamusume was 
still laughing while out of breath. вА¶вА¶It was a little unnerving.
Oh geezпљЮ, you did it again, are you okay?
text_block_list.name: Nice Nature

text_block_list.text:
Can't you do something about that habit of yours of running 'til 
you drop? It's dangerous to fall on the course, don't you think?
text_block_list.name: Nice Nature

text_block_list.text:
But you see, Nature, todayвА¶вА¶ it felt like 
вАХвАХHaa вА¶вА¶it'd be especially Marvelous!
text_block_list.name: пЉЯпЉЯпЉЯ

text_block_list.text:
Yeah, yeah. I figured you'd say that but, if you keep 
collapsing like that, it'll make everyone else worry!
text_block_list.name: Nice Nature

text_block_list.text:
Eh? вА¶вА¶AhпљЮ, were you observing, Trainer-san? 
I guess it would be surprising if she suddenly 
fellпљЮ, but it's something that happens all the time!
text_block_list.name: Nice Nature

text_block_list.text:
This girlвАХвАХ her name's Marvelous Sunday but, 
I guess you could say she's the type that 
doesn't know her own limits and just runs frantically?
text_block_list.name: Nice Nature

text_block_list.text:
She never puts on the brakes, so she ends up 
moving until she runs out of energy. She's like 
a little kid and ends up falling asleep mid-meal.
text_block_list.name: Nice Nature

text_block_list.text:
Anyways, it's not like she's sick or injured so there's no need to 
worry! I'm sure she'll be able to move after she rests for a bit!
text_block_list.name: Nice Nature

text_block_list.text:
Because it was such a memorable encounter, now, everytime I see a 
red ribbon, I can't help but follow it with my eyes. When I doвАХвАХ

Ahahahahaa, AhahaaвШЖ 
The wax is so slipperyпљЮ, the hallway's so shiny, MarvelousвШЕ
text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday

text_block_list.text:
Geez, you're really energetic today tooпљЮ. 
Make sure it's safe before you start running, okay?
text_block_list.name: Nice Nature

text_block_list.text:
OkaaaпљЮyвШЖ 
AhahaaпљЮ, slide slideпљЮ, MarvelousвШЕ

text_block_list.text: Mystery tea!
text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday

text_block_list.text: Mystery tea! вАХвАХgulpвА¶вА¶ gulpвА¶вА¶puhaa!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun

text_block_list.text:
Ahahaa, you're right, it's not tasty at allвШЖ 
So mysterious and so yucky, but still very MarvelousвШЕ
text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday

text_block_list.text:
Ahahahahaa, my arms feel like putty! My legs are shaking! 
I can't moveпљЮ, Ma-rvelousвШЖвШЕвШЖ

text_block_list.text:
Muscle soreness is MarvelousвШЖ Tomorrow will be moreпљЮ MarvelousвШЕ 
Ow ow ow oww, AhahahahaaвШЖ
text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday

text_block_list.text:
The word гАОMarvelousгАП repeatedly came out of Marvelous Sunday's mouth. 
After hearing it so many times, I was starting to have my doubts.

I can't even tell if it's something happy, painful, good, or bad. 
But, whenever she said гАОMarvelousгАП, her expression seemed cheerful.

Maybe for her, the word had a different meaning than the one in the 
dictionary. I realized that I wanted to know what that meaning was.

C'monпљЮпљЮ, just when I felt like training today! 
I hate the rain, Maya's bored!
text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun

text_block_list.text:
But Mayano, the rain is reallyпљЮ Marvelous, you know?вШЖ 
Especially when it's raining hard like this, it's even more MarvelousвШЕ
text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday

text_block_list.text:
EhпљЮ, how? If it's raining this hard, we might not be able 
to train tomorrow either, you know? Maya wants to run!
text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun

text_block_list.text:
That's true, if you can't run because it's 
raining, it's boring, huh?вШЖ But if you wait, 
and wait, and wait a little more for the sun thenвАХвАХ
text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday

text_block_list.text:
ThenвА¶вА¶ what? Maybe now I'll finally figure out what she means by 
marvelous. That's what I thought while lisenting closely, butвАХвАХ

Ahh, Maya's got it! You're right, I guess if you think 
about that then the rain might just be marvelousвЩ™
text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun

text_block_list.text:
Right!? Ahahaa, rain, rain falling MarvelousпљЮвШЖ 
Splish splash, splish splash MarveпљЮlousвШЕ
text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday

text_block_list.text: MarveпљЮlousвШЖ
text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun

text_block_list.text: Ahahahahaa, let's go!
text_block_list.name: Both

text_block_list.text:
My shoulders dropped because I didn't get my answer. Once again, 
today I was still unable to figure out what гАОMarvelousгАП meant.
